policies.policy_name: Energy Efficiency Act - Data Centre Waste Heat Reuse Requirements
policies.summary: Requires new and existing data centers to meet energy efficiency standards and examine opportunities for waste heat reuse. Operators must provide information about available waste heat to local heating networks where technically and economically feasible.
policies.key_requirements: Data center operators must monitor energy performance, publish efficiency indicators, and assess waste heat reuse potential. New data centers must be designed so recovered heat can be supplied to district heating or other external users when feasible.

policies.policy_name: Energy Efficiency Directive Article 12 - Data Centres
policies.summary: Sets EU-wide reporting and performance requirements for data centers, including information relevant to energy consumption and waste heat use. Member States must collect and publish data center sustainability indicators above defined capacity thresholds.
policies.key_requirements: Data center owners and operators must report energy performance indicators, including waste heat utilization where applicable. Member States must make aggregated information publicly available.
referenced_policies: Commission Delegated Regulation on data centre sustainability reporting

policies.policy_name: Waste Heat and District Heating Support Scheme
policies.summary: Supports integration of industrial and data center waste heat into district heating systems. The policy encourages heat network operators and large electricity consumers to document recoverable heat and coordinate connection projects.
policies.key_requirements: Eligible projects must show useful waste heat potential, district heating demand, and compliance with Danish energy planning requirements. Data centers may qualify when recovered heat replaces fossil heat production.

policies.summary: Creates a regulatory framework for heat networks and supports low-carbon heat sources, including recovered heat. Data center waste heat is mentioned as a possible heat source but is not the primary focus of the regulation.
policies.key_requirements: Heat network operators must comply with authorization, consumer protection, and technical standards. Recovered heat sources may need to meet network connection and metering requirements.

policies.policy_name: Potential Data Centre Heat Recovery Guidance
policies.summary: Partially extracted mock record used to test how the frontend handles scraper errors and human review states.
policies.error_details: Access denied during crawl; content requires human review.
